violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the front sandwich prep unit. Gaskets must be maintained in good condition. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 02/05/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in fan guards have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025
The hood system was observed with an accumulation of debris. Hood system must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 01/21/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the prep unit. Gaskets must be maintained in good condition New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024
The door to the kitchen toilet room is not self-closing. Establishment must make the door self closing Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2024
